name: Zoomify
author: Flaze
description: Optifine-style zoom for Raft. Hold a key to zoom in, use the scroll wheel to adjust the zoom level, with optional smooth transitions.

modSettings.name: zoomKey
tooltip: Hold this key to zoom in.
Note: C is also Raft's default Crouch/Dive key.
Rebind one of them to avoid conflicts.

modSettings.name: defaultZoomFactor
modSettings.tooltip: How many times zoomed in when you first press the zoom key. 5 = 5x zoom. You can then scroll while holding the key to adjust further.

modSettings.name: scrollStep
modSettings.tooltip: How many zoom levels each scroll tick moves. Example: 1 = each tick adds/removes 1x zoom. Above 10x the step is doubled, above 20x it is quintupled automatically.

modSettings.name: enableSmoothing
modSettings.tooltip: Smoothly animates into and out of zoom. When disabled, zoom snaps instantly.

modSettings.name: smoothingSpeed
modSettings.tooltip: How fast the zoom animation plays. 1 = very slow glide, 30 = almost instant snap. Only active when Smooth Zoom is enabled.
